'''yatubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dock|dock]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-t-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dock|dock]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yatubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yætibith|yætibith]] || [[word:yætibij|yætibij]] || [[word:yætibish|yætibish]] || [[word:yætibi|yætibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yatutubuth|yatutubuth]] || [[word:yatutubuj|yatutubuj]] || [[word:yatutubush|yatutubush]] || [[word:yatutubu|yatutubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yatubuth|yatubuth]] || [[word:yatubuj|yatubuj]] || [[word:yatubush|yatubush]] || [[word:yatubu|yatubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yatufbufth|yatufbufth]] || [[word:yatufbufj|yatufbufj]] || [[word:yatufbufsh|yatufbufsh]] || [[word:yatufbuf|yatufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yatubuthu|yatubuthu]] || [[word:yatubuju|yatubuju]] || [[word:yatubushu|yatubushu]] || [[word:yatubuku|yatubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yatubuth|yatubuth]] || [[word:yatubuj|yatubuj]] || [[word:yatubush|yatubush]] || [[word:yatubu|yatubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yatubuthul|yatubuthul]] || [[word:yatubujul|yatubujul]] || [[word:yatubushul|yatubushul]] || [[word:yatubukul|yatubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yatubuuthuthu|yatubuuthuthu]] || [[word:yatubuujuju|yatubuujuju]] || [[word:yatubuushushu|yatubuushushu]] || [[word:yatubuuku|yatubuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yatubuthun|yatubuthun]] || [[word:yatubujun|yatubujun]] || [[word:yatubushun|yatubushun]] || [[word:yatubukun|yatubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yatubuthuoro|yatubuthuoro]] || [[word:yatubujuoro|yatubujuoro]] || [[word:yatubushuoro|yatubushuoro]] || [[word:yatubukuoro|yatubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
